summary: Created minimal-saas.yaml seed template and added comprehensive Template Capture section to SKILL.md. The template follows the established schema exactly and provides a clean, professional SaaS aesthetic based on Linear/Vercel/Stripe patterns. The capture instructions explain the full process from analysis to template creation.
learnings: Template creation requires balancing structure with aesthetic nuance - the style_notes field is critical for capturing the intangible 'feel'
The schema from D2.1 works well for capturing all necessary template parameters
Clear naming conventions (minimal-saas vs generic names) make templates discoverable and memorable
notes: The minimal-saas template uses restrained colors (#0A0A0A, #2563EB, #FFFFFF) and Inter typography to achieve the 'grown-up startup' aesthetic. The Template Capture section provides systematic guidance for analyzing pages and creating new templates, including color extraction, typography assessment, and aesthetic essence capture.
